title: metrosideros macropus
intro: Metrosideros macropus, also known as the New Zealand rata, is a native tree species found in New Zealand and southern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, providing benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, Metrosideros macropus is often used as a tea or infused in oil, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized and providing relief from various health issues.
